mappings.gap_detail: Schema incompatibility: pre-generic vs generic. fastapi_conformance_path directory DOES NOT EXIST (docs/psee/PI.BLUEEDGE.FASTAPI-CONFORMANCE.SIGNAL-RECOMPUTE-AND-BINDING.01/recomputed). Phase 5 would fail for BlueEdge. Even if available, schema translation required.

decision_state.json is a PIOS_40.7 artifact produced by a prior contract chain. The generic pipeline (run_client_pipeline.py) has no phase that produces decision_state. This is an output gap — not a regression.
New artifact introduced by PI.LENS.PHASE8B-REDEFINITION.01. Not in baseline. Would be produced if pipeline could reach Phase 8b (currently blocked at Phase 2).
